train_script.description: Absolute path to the PyTorch training script (.py). Must exist on disk. Script must initialize torch.distributed using Slurm env vars (SLURM_PROCID, SLURM_NTASKS, etc.).

work_dir.description: Absolute path to the working directory. sbatch stdout/stderr land here as train.slurm.{out,err}. Must exist and be writable.

apptainer_sif.description: Absolute path to the apptainer (singularity) image containing PyTorch + CUDA + NCCL on the compute nodes.

extra_args.description: Extra positional/flag arguments forwarded verbatim to the training script (e.g. ['--epochs', '50']).

dry_run.description: If true (default), render and write the sbatch script but do NOT submit. Set false to actually submit.

nodes.description: Number of compute nodes. THIS TOOL REQUIRES nodes >= 2 (single-node training should use train_pytorch_gpu).

ntasks_per_node.description: MPI ranks per node. For 1-rank-per-GPU PyTorch DDP/FSDP, set equal to gpus (per node).

mpi_fabric.description: MPI transport fabric. 'auto' = OFI (verbs,tcp) which works on most clusters. Force tcp only as a fallback when the high-performance fabric misbehaves.

gpus.description: Number of GPUs PER NODE. THIS TOOL REQUIRES gpus >= 1 (it is purpose-built GPU; CPU-only is not supported).

gpu_type.description: GPU model selector. Maps to Slurm --gres=gpu:<type>:N. Use 'any' to skip the type filter.

gpu_partition.description: Slurm partition. Required (this tool only targets GPU partitions).
